segments.text: I feel the sun just go under the daylight

brown skin shine With the street lamp light
got em stuck in the body All,
had to sleep on my tone Whole room stand like a queen on a throne
but the glance is loud Every lens locked in,
curves on the rise Tiny little waist doing work oversize
sitting real neat Gold chain restin' while my last so sweet
little slit on the side Movin' through
the crowd with my natural pride
but I'm tryna stay clean Loyal to my peace,
Sundress glow under the daylight Hips swing slow in the midnight
heart stay cold But my stride got flanked

other walk by and the streets say please

sun-caulked at crease We summertime fine,

that's a natural light Walk so smooth,

all the heads do a spin They checkin' their ring,
in We talk all day about loyal and pure

but you don't know what I'm talking about
but you guard that line I just like the T's,
